attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID, 
TRIM(BATCH_NAME) AS BATCH_NAME,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
'CG' AS SS_CODE,
SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
ACCOUNTED_DR,
ACCOUNTED_CR,
ENTERED_DR,
ENTERED_CR,
SEGMENT1,
SEGMENT2,
SEGMENT3,
SEGMENT4,
SEGMENT5,
SEGMENT6
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_CG1 STECPS
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY  ECPS
WHERE ECPS.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID = STECPS.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID AND ECPS.SS_CODE = 'CG' )
